series_metadata.series_title: Requests for Transfer of General Appropriation and
series_metadata.series_description: Allows state agencies to transfer funds between appropriation line items. O.R.C. 127.13

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
